title: Blue Star India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Blue Star India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Blue Star India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Blue Star India:
Blue Star India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India!
